mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensor_layout (layout_name, description, sensor_count, coverage_rate, risk_score, status) VALUES (#{layoutName}, #{description}, #{sensorCount}, #{coverageRate}, #{riskScore}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, layout_name as layoutName, description, sensor_count as sensorCount, coverage_rate as coverageRate, risk_score as riskScore, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM sensor_layout ORDER BY updated_at DESC

SELECT id, layout_name as layoutName, description, sensor_count as sensorCount, coverage_rate as coverageRate, risk_score as riskScore, status, created_at as createdAt, updated_at as updatedAt FROM sensor_layout WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sensor_layout_detail (layout_id, sensor_id, x, y, installation_height, effective_range, detection_range, priority, risk) VALUES (#{layoutId}, #{sensorId}, #{x}, #{y}, #{installationHeight}, #{effectiveRange}, #{detectionRange}, #{priority}, #{risk})
mapper.select: SELECT id, layout_id as layoutId, sensor_id as sensorId, x, y, installation_height as installationHeight, effective_range as effectiveRange, detection_range as detectionRange, priority, risk, created_at as createdAt FROM sensor_layout_detail WHERE layout_id = #{layoutId} ORDER BY sensor_id ASC
